signals.title: OpenAI’s CEO of AGI Deployment, Fidji Simo, Is Stepping Down
signals.desc: The move comes after Simo took significant medical leave. She will stay on as a part-time adviser.

signals.title: Apple Is Suing OpenAI for Allegedly Stealing Hardware Secrets
signals.desc: The iPhone-maker claims OpenAI encouraged poached employees to bring over confidential presentations, secret prototypes, and key supplier details.

signals.title: OpenAI may have made a fatal misstep in copyright fight with news orgs
signals.desc: OpenAI may be sanctioned for hiding, deleting ChatGPT logs in NYT copyright fight.

signals.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
signals.desc: Learn how GPT-5.6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work.

signals.title: The ChatGPT browser is already dead
signals.desc: OpenAI is already shutting down ChatGPT Atlas, its browser that could do tasks for you on your behalf, less than a year after launching it. Atlas was announced in October, but as part of its wave of news about ChatGPT Work today, the company confirmed that it will be "sunsetting" Atlas and is targeting an […]

signals.title: Anthropic found a hidden space where Claude puzzles over concepts
signals.desc: The AI firm Anthropic has developed a technique that has given it the clearest glimpse yet at what’s really going on inside large language models as they answer questions or carry out tasks. What they found ranges from the mundane to the unnerving. Researchers at the company built a tool called the Jacobian lens (or…

signals.title: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
signals.desc: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.

signals.title: Paris-based AI voice startup Gradium raises $100M seed, backed by Nvidia
signals.desc: The company is using the cash to open an office in the Bay Area and compete for talent there, "strengthening its position at the heart of the world's leading AI ecosystem."

signals.title: OpenAI wants its new tool to do your work for you and with you
signals.desc: Rebranded Codex promises independent workflows that can run "for hours if needed."

signals.title: Google will now disclose which ads are made with AI
signals.desc: While Google prohibits misleading and deceptive ads, an ad can still leverage AI to create some type of synthetic or digitally altered content. Until now, that's something Google only required election ads to disclose.

signals.title: Say hello to Claude Wrapped
signals.desc: The popularity of Spotify Wrapped has kicked off a wide range of year-in-review features, on apps from YouTube to Uber - and now, the lookback trend has come to AI. Anthropic on Thursday announced a "reflect" feature for its Claude chatbot, allowing users to see an analysis of their usage data over the past month, […]

signals.title: Nvidia is a victim of the compute marketplace it created
signals.desc: Having proven how valuable compute can be, the company finds itself at the center of a market everyone wants to be in — while simpler technologies and less interesting companies get rich on the sidelines.

signals.title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
signals.desc: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.

signals.title: Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX are bigger than the last 25 years of tech exits
signals.desc: Three big AI IPOs are set to generate more value than all the U.S. VC-backed exits since 2000.

signals.title: ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
signals.desc: ChatGPT Work is an agent that can take action across your apps and files, stay with a project for hours if needed, and turn a goal into finished work.

signals.title: How finance teams use ChatGPT Work
signals.desc: See how finance teams can use ChatGPT Work to build MBRs, reporting packs, variance bridges, model checks, and planning scenarios from real work inputs.

signals.title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition
signals.desc: More intelligence from every token, stronger performance per dollar, and more capability on demand for your hardest work.

signals.title: GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
signals.desc: Details about the OpenAI Bio Bounty program

signals.title: Building the infrastructure for the Intelligence Age in Michigan
signals.desc: OpenAI breaks ground on a 1GW data center project in Michigan as part of Stargate, building AI infrastructure to expand access, create jobs, and support communities.

signals.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
signals.desc: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

signals.title: Would you host part of an AI data center in your home?
signals.desc: A solar and home energy storage company is expanding into AI data centers, but not by building one - instead, it's offering to pay its customers to put its compute units in their homes. Sunrun is launching a pilot program for a new "distributed AI compute" program that will "place numerous compute nodes in homes […]

signals.title: Hugging Face’s CEO on why companies are done renting their AI
signals.desc: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Delangue has seen the same story play out again and again: companies start […]

signals.title: Lawsuit: Man used Grok to make 7K sex images of stepdaughter, then shot himself
signals.desc: More young girls sue X over Grok CSAM; X accused of shielding child predators.

signals.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
signals.desc: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

signals.title: Disable autoplay and infinite scroll or risk massive fines, EU tells Meta
signals.desc: Digital Services Act may force Meta to make big changes on its platforms.

signals.title: Google updates Android Bench with new LLMs, but Gemini still lags behind
signals.desc: Android Bench is evolving, and developers can help guide that process.

signals.title: Our approach to government and national security partnerships
signals.desc: Learn how OpenAI approaches government and national security partnerships, with principles for responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety.

signals.title: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
signals.desc: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.

signals.title: Instagram’s Adam Mosseri: If you don’t like AI, ‘then you shouldn’t have it in your feed’
signals.desc: Though Instagram head Adam Mosseri doesn't want to filter out AI content on the platform, he argues that you "shouldn't have it in your feed" if you don't like it. "I don't think we should filter out AI content," Mosseri said during an interview on Lenny Rachitsky's podcast. "I think we should let you know […]

signals.title: Introducing GPT-Live
signals.desc: A new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction, now powering ChatGPT Voice.

signals.title: OpenAI’s Frontier Governance Framework
signals.desc: Explore OpenAI’s Frontier Governance Framework and how our AI safety, security, and risk practices align with emerging EU and California regulations.

signals.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
signals.desc: Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.

signals.title: Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills
signals.desc: OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.

signals.title: PRC-linked influence operations are targeting AI debates in the US
signals.desc: A new report from OpenAI details PRC-linked influence operations using AI to target U.S. tech debates, data center narratives, tariffs, and false claims about ChatGPT.

signals.title: How NVIDIA engineers and researchers build with Codex
signals.desc: Teams use Codex with GPT-5.5 to ship production systems and turn research ideas into runnable experiments.

signals.title: How agents are transforming work
signals.desc: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.

signals.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
signals.desc: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.

signals.title: A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT
signals.desc: Preview a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT for Pro users in the U.S. Securely connect your financial accounts and get AI-powered insights and guidance grounded in your financial context, goals, and priorities.

signals.title: Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows
signals.desc: Databricks uses GPT-5.5 for enterprise agent workflows after the model set a new state of the art on the OfficeQA Pro benchmark.

signals.title: This Former DeepMind Exec Thinks the AI Arms Race Could End in Disaster
signals.desc: Verity Harding tells WIRED that the US government’s nationalistic attitude toward AI is evidence that a worst-case scenario is taking shape.
